channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 7 azioni chiave da intraprendere nel 2025 per un CIO sempre più autorevole
item.description: Nei prossimi 12 mesi i CIO hanno due grandi priorità: sviluppare un solido business case per la spesa in infrastruttura per l’intelligenza artificiale e aumentare la cybersicurezza e la resilienza.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Hackers have posted some RIBridges data on the dark web, McKee says
item.description: The state disclosed earlier this month that cybercriminals had gained access to the state's IT system for social services.
item.dc:creator: Ted Nesi, NewsNation

item.title: Airline Ticket Nightmare: A Cautionary Tale of Credit Card Points and Unreliable Rewards Programs
item.description: A traveler's nightmare: trying to book an airline ticket with credit card points only to be met with error messages, uncooperative customer service, and a refusal to refund points. One woman's story highlights the complexities and pitfalls of using rewards programs involving multiple airlines.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Elliott, King Features Syndicate, Inc., The Mercury News

item.title: Leaked codenames point to the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7, Z Flip 7, and Z Fold SE 2
item.description: It looks as though there are at least three foldable phones on the way from Samsung through the course of 2025.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Hands-on with Adobe’s Acrobat AI Assistant: AI for your PDFs
item.description: We may be on the brink of 2025, but PDFs are still unavoidable in the professional world. No matter what industry you work in, you’re bound to whittle away precious moments wading through reports, white papers, and other dense documents in that clunky-feeling form.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Meet the mad scientist of headphones, whose wild designs electrify Reddit
item.description: The standard shape for big, chunky headphones has long been a rainbow with Moon Pies at either end. No rule exists, however, forcing audio companies to keep making them that way. Philip Kaplan, the tech entrepreneur behind Tiny Letter and DistroKid, has been proving as much all year.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Android 15's new Private Space feature puts an end to app snooping
item.description: Android 15's latest feature, Private Space, is like a private vault helping to keep your personal or sensitive apps away from prying eyes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Everything leaving Hulu in January 2025
item.description: It's inevitable that Hulu removes more titles from its platform each month, but for January 2025, there aren't any titles I can say that I'm going to miss when they depart.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge
item.description: Gain insights into the future of ICAM and its role in secure, modern government operations. The post Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network
